element_introduction_order.mastery_context: fundamental traversal mechanics in linear early levels
primary melee weapon for enemy engagement
ranged combat with basic charging mechanic for power shots
vertical traversal in linear stage design
avoidance and timing in linear progression
combat encounters within linear level flow
expanded projectile arsenal for varied enemy types
high-impact weapon for specific obstacles and enemies
spatial constraint navigation using down + jump button combination
non-linear routing and route decision-making replaces linear progression
mandatory progression gates requiring pattern recognition and combat mastery
optional secret discovery encouraging exploration within each level
respawn system reducing progression loss penalty

typical_tension_triggers: maze-like exploration areas with multiple routes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Early stages maintain linear momentum with regular enemy and hazard encounters; later stages shift to exploratory maze-like design creating navigation tension before relief; boss gates punctuate progression with high-stress mandatory encounters

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: hidden letters spelling PITFALL and other secrets distributed throughout stages encourage exploratory backtracking
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: hidden collectibles and secrets integrated into stage design, signaled through level exploration rather than explicit visual markers

difficulty_curve.early_game: Large linear stages with manageable obstacles and enemies; introduces core mechanics (running, jumping, climbing, swinging, basic combat) without overwhelming complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Expanded weapon variety (boomerangs, explosives); increased enemy density; longer stage layouts requiring sustained mechanical execution
difficulty_curve.late_game: Maze-like exploratory areas replacing linear progression; route selection complexity; higher frequency of boss encounters; navigation decision-making increases cognitive load
notable_spikes: Boss encounter gates requiring pattern mastery
Transition from linear to maze-like stage design creating exploration uncertainty

notable_level_patterns.description: Early stages feature straightforward left-to-right flow populated with enemies, environmental hazards, and platforming challenges. Player navigates through combat and traversal without route decision-making.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early stages (exact level names not documented)

notable_level_patterns.description: Later stages transition to non-linear layouts requiring player to choose between multiple routes to reach the stage exit. Creates navigation tension and encourages exploration.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Later stages (exact level names not documented)

notable_level_patterns.description: Mandatory boss encounters function as progression gates requiring defeat to advance. Boss fights feature pattern-based mechanics distinct from standard traversal and combat.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Scattered throughout campaign (specific boss names not documented)
